integrations.title: Interstellar Core
integrations.notes: Reference source for browser workspace feel and selected feature parity, not wholesale ownership of the app.

integrations.title: Nettle Emulator Lane
integrations.notes: First emulator lane is now mounted through local wrapper routes so the shell can grow into a real emulator surface cleanly.

integrations.title: Custom Shell Layer
integrations.notes: Local customization boundary for themes, layouts, lane cards, and future feature flags.

integrations.title: Persistent Session Store
integrations.notes: Proxy sessions now persist across runtime restarts for a real managed workspace flow.

integrations.title: Route Wrapper Layer
integrations.notes: Games, apps, and emulator paths now have real wrapper views instead of dead placeholders.
